text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Sweep, happy birthday! ...Oh, something the
matter?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I thought I would learn some kind of new magic
on my birthday...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But I still can't call down lightning, summon rain
clouds, or even fly through the sky!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
C'mooon! How long do I have to wait to become
a witch?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what if I pick you up so it feels like you're
flying through the sky?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Don't treat me like a little kid! Besides, that's not
even magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Although... that does sound kinda fun, so I'll let
you carry me just this once!
